# Copy That Sells

> A Claude skill that writes copy which sells. Print ads, OOH, headlines, landing pages, emails, manifestos. Combines D&AD Copy Book craft, Bly direct-response frameworks, and Cannes Lions plus Clio Award print and OOH winners from the last 25 years.

## What this repo is

A single skill, `copy-that-sells`, packaged for two Claude environments:

- **Claude Code**: install as a plugin from this repo's marketplace.
- **Claude Cowork**: download the bundled `.skill` file from `dist/`.

The skill teaches Claude the craft and structure of conversion copywriting. It runs a structured workflow (briefing, idea, headline, body, CTA, self-edit) when the user asks for copy that should sell.

## Primary skill files

Core craft:
- [skills/copy-that-sells/SKILL.md](skills/copy-that-sells/SKILL.md): the entry point. Two-mode workflow (generation + diagnostic) with briefing, research, idea, headline, body, offer, CTA, and self-edit passes.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/frameworks.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/frameworks.md): Schwartz's 5 awareness levels and market sophistication, Bly's 8 headline categories plus 3 modern extensions (Listicle, Negative, Outcome-first), 4 U's, So-What ladder, AIDA, PAS, BFD, 7-step direct-response letter, long-copy architecture.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/craft.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/craft.md): D&AD Copy Book lessons.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/examples.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/examples.md): 122 campaigns organised across 17 technique sections.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/self-edit.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/self-edit.md): three-layer final pass. Craft check, anti-AI tells (English Era 1 to 4 plus full Spanish list), truth check.

Format and language:
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/formats.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/formats.md): per-format blueprints with word counts for subject line and preheader, cold email, landing hero, pricing page, sales page, billboard, paid social (15-structure hook bank), paid search (responsive search ads), push, App Store, manifesto, pre-roll.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/spanish-craft.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/spanish-craft.md): Spanish writing reference. 20 percent rule, verb position, regional variants, vos/tú/usted, banned Spanish vocabulary, verified verbatim LatAm and Spanish campaign lines.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/voice-bank.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/voice-bank.md): fifteen voices with samples and use cases, including three native Spanish registers.
- [skills/copy-that-sells/references/diagnostics.md](skills/copy-that-sells/references/diagnostics.md): critique-first procedure for when the user pastes existing copy.

Cookbook:
- [skills/copy-that-sells/cookbook/](skills/copy-that-sells/cookbook/): five end-to-end worked examples covering billboard (Spanish), pricing page, manifesto, cold email, App Store listing.

## Install commands

Claude Code:
```
/plugin marketplace add avectats7/copy-that-sells
/plugin install copy-that-sells
```

Claude Cowork: download `dist/copy-that-sells.skill` and open it in Cowork.

## When the skill triggers

The skill fires on substantive copywriting requests. Phrases like "write an ad," "write a billboard," "headline ideas," "tagline," "rewrite this so it converts," "long-copy ad," "manifesto," "make this email punchier."

## License

MIT. Free to use, modify, and ship commercially.

## Maintainer

Tato Polanco. https://github.com/avectats7
